I agree that option A, Acromegaly, is correct because its primary cause is indeed an endocrine disorder involving excessive production of growth hormone usually resulting from pituitary tumors. However, another important aspect worth noting is that while some cases may be idiopathic, many instances arise specifically from benign pituitary adenomas which secrete too much GH, making this condition quintessentially tied to an endocrine malfunction.
